alertRules.name: High Error Rate
alertRules.description: Triggers when error rate exceeds 5% over 5 minutes
alertRules.query: requests | where timestamp > ago(5m) | where resultCode >= 400 | summarize ErrorRate = count() * 100.0 / toscalar(requests | where timestamp > ago(5m) | count())

alertRules.name: High Response Time
alertRules.description: Triggers when average response time exceeds 2 seconds over 5 minutes
alertRules.query: requests | where timestamp > ago(5m) | summarize avg(duration)

alertRules.name: Database Performance Degradation
alertRules.description: Triggers when database query time exceeds 1 second average over 5 minutes
alertRules.query: dependencies | where type == 'SQL' | where timestamp > ago(5m) | summarize avg(duration)

alertRules.name: Health Check Failure
alertRules.description: Triggers when any health check fails
alertRules.query: customMetrics | where name startswith 'HealthCheck.Status' | where timestamp > ago(2m) | summarize arg_max(timestamp, value) by name | where value == 0 | count

alertRules.name: Security Alert - Multiple Failed Logins
alertRules.description: Triggers when there are multiple failed login attempts
alertRules.query: traces | where message contains 'SecurityAuditEvent' | extend eventType = tostring(customDimensions.SecurityAuditEvent.EventType) | where eventType == 'UserLoginAttempt' | extend successful = tobool(customDimensions.SecurityAuditEvent.Successful) | where successful == false | where timestamp > ago(10m) | summarize count() by tostring(customDimensions.SecurityAuditEvent.Email) | where count_ >= 3

actions.subject: Ergoplanner: Security Alert - Multiple Failed Logins

alertRules.name: High Memory Usage
alertRules.query: customMetrics | where name == 'Performance.MemoryUsage' | where timestamp > ago(5m) | summarize avg(value)

alertRules.name: Exception Rate High
alertRules.description: Triggers when exception rate exceeds 10 per minute

alertRules.name: Cache Miss Rate High
alertRules.description: Triggers when cache miss rate exceeds 50%
alertRules.query: customMetrics | where name in ('Cache.Hits', 'Cache.Misses') | where timestamp > ago(10m) | summarize hits = sumif(value, name == 'Cache.Hits'), misses = sumif(value, name == 'Cache.Misses') | extend missRate = misses * 100.0 / (hits + misses) | project missRate

actions.subject: Ergoplanner: High Cache Miss Rate Alert

alertRules.name: Brute Force Attack Detection
alertRules.description: Triggers when brute force attack is detected
alertRules.query: traces | where message contains 'SecurityAuditEvent' | extend eventType = tostring(customDimensions.SecurityAuditEvent.EventType) | where eventType == 'BruteForceAttempt' | where timestamp > ago(5m) | count

actions.subject: Ergoplanner: CRITICAL - Brute Force Attack Detected

alertRules.name: Unauthorized Access Attempts
alertRules.description: Triggers when unauthorized access attempts exceed threshold
alertRules.query: traces | where message contains 'SecurityAuditEvent' | extend eventType = tostring(customDimensions.SecurityAuditEvent.EventType) | where eventType == 'UnauthorizedAccess' | where timestamp > ago(10m) | count

configuration.alertDescriptionTemplate: Alert triggered for Ergoplanner application. Please investigate immediately.
